data.name: 催眠卡牌
data.detailed_description:
主角是一個眼裡只有打牌的牌佬，一直母胎單身。 30歲生日這天，他獲得了可以催眠別的妹子的神奇卡牌。作為牌佬，他想使用這個能力干什麼呢？


《催眠卡牌》是一款圍繞卡組構建為核心的卡牌對戰遊戲，引入了新穎的部位概念。
玩家可以使用五個主要流派的眾多卡牌來與眾多少女展開卡牌戰鬥。


鹿目真一
後媽帶過來的妹妹，喜歡運動，品學兼優，待人友好，很受大家喜歡。 但實際上內心厭惡任何接近她的男生，對我特別冷漠。
三圍：82 58 88


春日奈奈
女僕咖啡廳的頭牌女僕，總是打扮成貓的形象，可愛又熱情，是我的心靈支柱。 由於太受客人歡迎，有時很難指名要她服務。
三圍：98 62 92



❤ 5個美麗的女孩
遊戲中共有5個不同的女孩可以邂逅！

❤ 動態變化的地圖
地圖均為隨機生成，每一次的體驗都截然不同。

❤ 隨機的神秘事件
擁有眾多的神秘事件，觸發劇情或者強力卡牌？一切全看你的選擇。

❤ 丰富的卡牌和组合
可定制套牌，形成不同的策略！

data.short_description: 《催眠卡牌》是一款牌組構建遊戲，引入了新穎的部位概念。 玩家可以使用眾多卡牌來與五位少女展開卡牌戰鬥。
data.supported_languages:
英文, 俄文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo 或更高
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Hypnosis Card
data.detailed_description:
The protagonist is a poker player who only cares about playing cards, and he has always been single. On his 30th birthday, he received a magical card that could hypnotize other girls. As a card player, what does he want to use this ability for?


"Hypnosis Card" is a card battle game centered around deck building, which introduces a body part concept. Players have access to many cards from five major genres. Encounter various events on randomly generated maps, develop the plot, and have exciting battles with cute girls.


Kanome Shinichi
The younger sister brought here by my stepmother. She likes sports and good at both morals and academics. She is friendly to others, and is very popular. But in fact, he hates any boy who comes close to her, and she is especially cold towards me.
Measurements: 82 58 88


Kasuga Nana
The top maid in the maid café. Always dressed as a cat. She is cute and enthusiastic and is the pillar of my soul. She is so popular with guests that sometimes it's difficult to name her for service.
Measurements: 98 62 92



❤ 5 beautiful girls
There are 5 different girls to encounter in the game!

❤ Dynamically changing map
Maps are randomly generated, and each experience is completely different.

❤ Random mysterious events
Have many mysterious events, trigger plots or powerful cards? It all depends on your choice.

❤ Rich cards and combinations
Customizable decks to form different strategies!

data.short_description: Hypnosis Cards is a deck-building game that introduces a novel concept of parts. Players can use numerous cards to engage in card battles with five girls.
data.supported_languages:
English, Russian, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo 或更高
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
